{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Carturus system
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Starhammer]] believes he is in or near the [[Carturus system]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c16">''The Engineer'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
